base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of battle_backgrounds_atlas — a tile from 1987 final fantasy. Battle backdrops — forest/desert/castle/cave/ocean/volcano per encounter region. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Battle backdrops — forest/desert/castle/cave/ocean/volcano per encounter region
